title: Star Wars (2015) 72
content:
{{Top|rwm|aor|title=''Star Wars'' (2015) 72}} {{Otheruses|Star Wars 72}} {{ComicBook |image=[[File:StarWars72-Cover.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars'' 72 |writer=[[Greg Pak]] |penciller=[[Phil Noto]] |inker=Phil Noto |letterer=[[Clayton Cowles]] |colorist=Phil Noto |cover artist=Phil Noto |editor=[[Mark Paniccia]] |publisher=[[Marvel Comics]] |release date=[[October 2]], [[2019]]{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/71198/star_wars_2015_72|text=Star Wars (2015) #72}} |pages=24 |upc=759606081134 |timeline=c. [[2 ABY]]''[[Star Wars: Timelines]]'' dates the events of ''Star Wars'' (2015) 72 to around [[2 ABY]]. |series=[[Star Wars (2015)|''Star Wars'' (2015)]] |issue=72 }} '''''Star Wars'' 72''' is the seventy-second issue of the [[canon]] [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series [[Star Wars (2015)|''Star Wars'']]. It was written by [[Greg Pak]], illustrated by [[Phil Noto]], and published on [[October 2]], [[2019]] by [[Marvel Comics]]. ==Publisher's summary== ''The time for answers is upon us – and destinies will change! As CHEWIE grapples with a terrible moral choice, LORD VADER reveals his plan for the rock people of K43! As LUKE questions where he's placed his trust, WARBA reveals her origins and true relationship to the FORCE! And as LEIA and DAR spin around the dance floor, HAN uncovers the real villains of Lanz Carpo!'' ==Opening crawl== {{OpeningCrawl |name=REBELS AND ROGUES
Part V |text=The Rebel Alliance's greatest heroes have been sent on three daring missions to thwart the evil Galactic Empire's efforts to locate the remaining freedom fighters. The droid C-3PO and the Wookiee Chewbacca's plan to destroy planet K43 is in peril when they encounter sentient life-forms beneath the planet's surface—and Darth Vader! On Lanz Carpo, Princess Leia and Han Solo join forces with Leia's ex, District Advocate Dar Champion, in the hope of tricking the Empire into destroying a crime boss and one of the Rebellion's biggest enemies. And on Sergia, Luke Skywalker has turned to Warba for help in saving rebel forces in the area. Luke is after Warba's knowledge of the Force—but Warba has her own secrets....}} ==Plot summary== ===The perils of K43=== On the volcanic planet of [[Mission to K43|K43]], [[Anakin Skywalker|Darth Vader]] and his Imperials demand that [[C-3PO]] act as an interpreter for them with the rock people. The droid, using a hidden comm, tries to discreetly warn [[Chewbacca]] of Vader's presence. Vader, observing the rock creatures, expresses his belief that they, like [[droid]]s, are free of emotion and fear. Meanwhile, as Chewbacca works to deactivate the detonators, he's discovered by [[stormtrooper]]s. He quickly defeats the patrol, prompting Vader to order his troops to surround, but not kill, the Wookiee. ===A shifting moral compass=== On [[Sergia]], [[Luke Skywalker|Luke]] and [[Warba Calip]] race away from the Imperial Garrison in a stolen speeder, with Luke celebrating their successful robbery. He's ready to use their stolen credits to buy the information they need, but Warba suggests they split the money and live a life of luxury. As they enter a town, they see stormtroopers interrogating civilians. The Imperials cause some damage before leaving, but not before warning the locals they're being watched. A dejected Warba tells Luke she grew up on [[Jedha]] and witnessed both miracles and suffering when the Empire plundered the planet's crystals. She says [[the Force]] is capable of both good and evil and, with this, she runs away with Luke's [[lightsaber]], ===A new plan on Lanz Carpo=== On [[Lanz Carpo]], [[Leia Skywalker Organa Solo|Leia]] and [[Dar Champion]] finalize their new plan. Dar explains that Leia's original plan would have led to the city's destruction and points to a massive airborne structure that serves as Boss Carpo's military fortress and surveillance outpost. He reveals that it is filled with the very criminals he has been trying to imprison. While Leia and Dar upload fake messages into the system, [[Han Solo]] is violently apprehended by Carpo guards, who inform him that Boss Carpo wants to talk to him. ==Media==
